g.text: Step 2: Greedy Search for Nearest Neighbors
SYSTEM INVARIANT: For all pairs (A, B) at Layer L: A ∈ neighbors(B, L) ⇔ B ∈ neighbors(A, L)

div.h1: HNSW Node Insertion: Bidirectional Edge Maintenance

p.strong: System Blueprint: Invariant Preservation & Pruning Logic

g.text: Search | Navigable from any entry point
Connectivity | No orphan nodes after pruning
Select M closest neighbors or use diversity heuristic (keep neighbors that are closer to query than to each other).
